reference: Hello. After I have been sitting for a while, my legs hurt when I stand. I am forty-five, but I feel as if I were an unhealthy ninety-year-old. In fact, I feel a lot of muscle fatigue. It is mostly upon standing. I am hunched over and can barely walk until I get used to moving, and then I am fine.
text: Hello. After I have been sitting for a while, my legs hurt when I stand. I am 45, but I feel as if I were an unhealthy 90-year-old. In fact, I feel a lot of muscle fatigue. It is mostly upon standing. I am hunched over and can barely walk until I get used to moving, and then I am fine.
